mundo.titulo: PM warns Burnham against immediate leadership challenge if he wins by-election
mundo.resumen: Keir Starmer says Labour should focus on a subsequent Manchester mayoral race if Andy Burnham wins in Makerfield.

mundo.titulo: Tracksuits and no ties - what England's off-pitch looks say about the team
mundo.resumen: What experts make of the men's team's official off-duty fashion as they prepare for their first World Cup match.

mundo.titulo: Israel launches fresh strikes on Lebanon despite Trump criticism
mundo.resumen: Speaking on Tuesday, Trump said Israel's PM Benjamin Netanyahu needed "to be more responsible with respect to Lebanon".

mundo.titulo: Jeremy Clarkson reveals prostate cancer diagnosis on farming show
mundo.resumen: The former Top Gear presenter did not clarify what type of cancer he had been diagnosed with.

mundo.titulo: Harry and Meghan to bring children to UK next month
mundo.resumen: It will be the first time the Duke of Sussex has brought his children to the UK in four years.

mundo.titulo: British couple describe having warning shots fired near them by Russian warship
mundo.resumen: The retired couple tell BBC Newsnight they tried to show the warship they had changed course in the English Channel before the shots were fired.

negocios.titulo: Inflation unexpectedly steady as food price rises slow
negocios.resumen: Higher petrol prices were offset by slower price rises for meat, dairy and vegetables, according to the ONS.

negocios.titulo: Cadbury chocolate-owner Mondelez defends staying in Russia
negocios.resumen: Mondelez boss Dirk Van de Put says it was the "right decision" to remain after the war with Ukraine.

negocios.titulo: Japan raids ice cream giants over price-fixing allegations
negocios.resumen: The investigation on alleged cartel pricing of ice cream comes as Japan faces record summer temperatures.

negocios.titulo: 'It's a unique scenario' - Inside Lidl's first ever pub
negocios.resumen: The supermarket chain Lidl owns and operates The Middle Ale, a 'world first' for the brand.

negocios.titulo: What is Helium-3 and could we get it from the moon?
negocios.resumen: Helium-3 is expensive and demand is forecast to soar, so some are planning to mine it on the moon.

negocios.titulo: Struggling Pizza Hut chain to be sold for $2.7bn
negocios.resumen: The decision comes after a prolonged period of difficulty for the chain, which has faced increasing competition from a range of rivals.

tecnologia.titulo: Pramaana Labs raises $27M seed round from Khosla Ventures to bring formal verification to AI
tecnologia.resumen: Pramaana will focus on highly sensitive verticals like law, drug discovery, and tax preparation — where errors can be costly and reliability is at a premium.

tecnologia.titulo: SpaceX alum nabs $22M to turn rocket engines into geothermal power plants
tecnologia.resumen: Critical Energy is turning rocket engines into geothermal power plants, and it wants to build 300 GW per year by 2045.

tecnologia.titulo: Canadian pension giant joins race to fund India’s AI-fueled data center boom
tecnologia.resumen: The Canadian pension giant will acquire an 8.2% stake in CtrlS, a tech giant that operates more than 15 data centers across India.

tecnologia.titulo: DeepL acquires Mixhalo for live-event audio streaming and translation
tecnologia.resumen: With this acquisition, DeepL is opening an office in San Francisco to expand its U.S. business.

tecnologia.titulo: Uber will bring its premium robotaxi service to Houston in 2027
tecnologia.resumen: This will be the second market to have an Uber robotaxi service outfitted with Lucid EVs equipped with a self-driving system from Nuro.

tecnologia.titulo: Pinterest launches an experimental AI shopping app called ‘Ask Pinterest’
tecnologia.resumen: Pinterest has launched 'Ask Pinterest,' an experimental AI-powered shopping app that lets users seek recommendations and inspiration through a conversational interface.

tecnologia.resumen: The Toy Story franchise began with a story about a vintage doll feeling threatened by the arrival of an electronic action figure. tecnologia.resumen: AI is pretty reliable at putting things on your calendar these days, but it hasn't quite cracked answering the related and all-important question of "What should I do this weekend?"
